parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  airport,
  COALESCE(origin, 'POA') AS origin,
  flight_date::text AS flight_date,
  city
FROM n8n_eventos
WHERE active = true
  AND flight_date >= CURRENT_DATE
  AND airport IS NOT NULL
  AND airport != COALESCE(origin, 'POA')
ORDER BY flight_date ASC;

WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO n8n_monitoramento
    (evento_id, checked_at, price, airline, dep_time, arr_time, stops, triggered)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.evento_id }}',
    NOW(),
    {{ $json.price }},
    '{{ $json.airline }}',
    '{{ $json.dep_time }}',
    '{{ $json.arr_time }}',
    {{ $json.stops }},
    false
  )
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  i.price           AS current_price,
  i.evento_id,
  '{{ $json.evento_name }}' AS evento_name,
  '{{ $json.airline }}'    AS airline,
  '{{ $json.dep_time }}'   AS dep_time,
  '{{ $json.arr_time }}'   AS arr_time,
  {{ $json.stops }}        AS stops,
  '{{ $json.origin }}'     AS origin,
  '{{ $json.dest }}'       AS dest,
  '{{ $json.flight_date }}' AS flight_date,
  (
    SELECT MIN(price) FROM n8n_monitoramento
    WHERE evento_id = i.evento_id
      AND checked_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 seconds'
  ) AS prev_min_price,
  CASE
    WHEN (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM n8n_monitoramento
      WHERE evento_id = i.evento_id
        AND checked_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 seconds'
    ) > 0
    AND i.price < (
      SELECT MIN(price) FROM n8n_monitoramento
      WHERE evento_id = i.evento_id
        AND checked_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 seconds'
    )
    THEN true
    ELSE false
  END AS price_dropped
FROM inserted i;
